pseudo_ref_note: No ground-truth transcript supplied; WER/CER computed between Whisper-tiny no-bias and Whisper-small + N-gram LM bias over first 2 min. Quantifies LM-bias effect, not absolute accuracy.
WER_note: WER not reported: no ground-truth transcript was supplied with the inference audio. The scripts/compute_wer.py helper computes WER against a user-provided ref_transcript.txt via jiwer.
voice_ref_note: Voice ref is 52.7s of user speech; x-vector loader zero-pads to the required 60s.
